text:
{"type":"task_assignment","taskId":"2","subject":"Analyze visual design gaps and propose airi-quality visual improvements","description":"**Role**: Visual Design & Aesthetics Expert

**Context**:
- the-ai-U current: Basic glassmorphism with CSS variables. Header has gradient logo, pill nav links. Chat bubbles have glass effect. Model area has gradient background.
- airi reference: Very clean, minimal. Soft green/mint palette. Wave decoration at top of character area. Extremely minimal chrome. Chat panel has very light blue tint. Tiny utility icons at bottom. Settings page has clean list with subtle dividers.

**Analysis Required**:
1. Color palette comparison: the-ai-U uses indigo/purple theme vs airi's soft green/mint. What palette works better for an AI companion and why?
2. Typography and spacing: Compare information density, whitespace usage, font sizing
3. Decorative elements: airi has wave patterns, soft shadows. What decorative elements should the-ai-U adopt?
4. Chrome reduction: airi has almost zero visible UI chrome on the main page. How can the-ai-U achieve this?
5. Chat panel styling: How should the chat sidebar look? Compare bubble styles, input area design
6. Icon and button design: airi uses tiny, non-intrusive utility icons. How should the-ai-U's buttons be redesigned?
7. Settings page design: airi has a clean list with drill-down. How should the-ai-U's settings be restructured?

**Key files to read**:
- /Users/rocky243/testing-project/aiGFproject/the-ai-U/desktop/src/index.css (current CSS variables)
- /Users/rocky243/testing-project/aiGFproject/the-ai-U/desktop/src/components/ChatMessage.tsx
- /Users/rocky243/testing-project/aiGFproject/the-ai-U/desktop/src/components/ChatInput.tsx

**Output**: Detailed visual design spec with color values, spacing values, and concrete CSS variable proposals.","assignedBy":"team-lead","timestamp":"2026-02-24T06:16:38.337Z"}

{"type":"task_assignment","taskId":"5","subject":"visual-expert","description":"You are a **Visual Design & Aesthetics Expert** on a UI/UX redesign team for \"the-ai-U\", an Electron","assignedBy":"visual-expert","timestamp":"2026-02-24T06:16:46.054Z"}
